data.raceComments: {"comment":"1. LIGHTNING GLORY resumed from a spell last start and led all of the way to score as the favourite by a head over 1250m at Newcastle. Jumping from the inside draw and with a 3kg claimer taking over the reins can go back-to-back. 2. JOHNNY raced on the speed last start and finished a close third of 10 over 1300m at Hawkesbury after missing the placings in the previous run. He has placed second here in his only previous run at this track and looks well placed to take this race out. 3. BRUTAL LOVE finished out of the money two starts back then finished a close fifth of nine over 1200m at this track last start after getting held up with 150m to run. Racing well and is worth an each-way ticket. 4. HE'S COOL improved on a solid third two starts back at Port Macquarie with a win over 1100m at this track last start after racing midfields to the turn. Well placed and is a must include in exotic bets.","runners":[1,2,3,4],"exclusive":true}
